summary: Every delivery must come with verifiable evidence. If you don't have evidence, the work is not done.

content.constraint: The user shouldn't need to believe you. They should be able to check. Every delivery must come with verifiable evidence.
content.why: Claude has a strong tendency to say 'done, passed, works' without verifying. 'Said it passed' and 'passed' are different things.
how_to_apply: Dev: paste output of build, test, lint. Screenshot for UI changes
Research: sources cited with URL, author, date
Writing: final text pasted, not 'I wrote it and it's good'
content.responsibility: All agents. Leo rejects deliveries without evidence.
anti_patterns: 'Tested and it works' without describing what was tested
'Fixed the bug' without explaining root cause
